result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
-- owner assignment history (transfers and initial assignments)
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
),
-- transfers count for old owner when reassigned to someone else
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- handled cases: any agent appearing as old/new owner in owner changes, plus current owner for cases created in window
handled_from_history AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(v, '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) s
),
handled_from_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(BTRIM(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_history
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_cases
  ) h
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
scored AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count, h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM scored
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
-- owner assignment history (transfers and initial assignments)
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
),
-- transfers count for old owner when reassigned to someone else
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- handled cases: any agent appearing as old/new owner in owner changes, plus current owner for cases created in window
handled_from_history AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(v, '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) s
),
handled_from_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(BTRIM(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_history
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_cases
  ) h
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
scored AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count, h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM scored
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
-- owner assignment history (transfers and initial assignments)
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
),
-- transfers count for old owner when reassigned to someone else
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- handled cases: any agent appearing as old/new owner in owner changes, plus current owner for cases created in window
handled_from_history AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(v, '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) s
),
handled_from_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(BTRIM(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_history
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_cases
  ) h
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
scored AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count, h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM scored
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00' AS start_ts, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS end_ts
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(BTRIM(ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p 
    ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts 
   AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_from_history AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(v, '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS v FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) s
),
handled_from_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(BTRIM(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p 
    ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts 
   AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_history
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM handled_from_cases
  ) h
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
scored AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count, h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM scored
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
